points.text: a Helldiver in the mines of Lykos, born the lowest of Reds
after Eo is hanged he lets the Sons of Ares remake him into a Gold to break the Society from within
takes the Gold name Darrow au Andromedus, called the Reaper
wins the role of Primus of House Mars at the Institute
Darrow's wife, a bright-eyed Red of Lykos
sings the forbidden song of the old freedoms and is hanged for it
her death is the spark of everything Darrow becomes
Darrow's steady older brother, stays behind in Lykos
Darrow's bitter, drink-loving uncle and fellow Helldiver
tied to the Sons of Ares, he cuts Darrow down from the gallows
a lanky, half-faced Red of the Sons of Ares
recruits Darrow into the rebellion
a burn-scarred Red of the Sons of Ares who hungers for open war
the masked leader of the Sons of Ares who orchestrates Darrow's rebirth
a Violet Carver who surgically remakes Darrow's Red body into a Gold's
a Pink who drills Darrow in Gold speech, manners and history
ArchGovernor of Mars and head of House Augustus, the most powerful Gold on the planet
father of Mustang and the Jackal
Darrow's ultimate enemy
brilliant and cunning, drafted into House Minerva
Nero's daughter and the Jackal's twin
becomes Darrow's closest ally and love at the Institute
sadistic and brilliant, rules House Pluto
Mustang's twin and Nero's son
cuts off his own hand to slip a trap
Darrow's chief rival in the war of the houses
the charming golden son of House Bellona
Darrow's best friend at the Institute
becomes a deadly enemy once he learns Darrow killed his twin
Cassius's gentle twin
Darrow is forced to beat him to death in the Passage
Cassius's hulking, brutal brother
small, filthy and utterly fearless
founds the Howlers, the wolfcloaked night raiders
Darrow's most loyal friend
a towering, cruel student of House Mars with a strange lowColor lilt
enslaves and abuses the weak until Darrow has him executed
a gentle poet of House Mars and one of Darrow's truest friends
wild, drug-loving and lethal with a blade, he rallies to Darrow's banner
kind and level-headed of House Mars, Roque's love
beautiful and ruthless of House Mars
betrays Darrow and throws in with the Jackal
a giant of a Gold, terrifying and honourable
comes to serve Darrow with fierce loyalty
a small, kind girl of House Mars, murdered by Titus
the cynical Proctor of House Mars who quietly helps Darrow
Sevro's father
the legendary Rage Knight, the greatest swordsman alive, spoken of in awe
the house of war, Darrow's house at the Institute
the house of wisdom and strategy, Mustang's house
the house of cunning and the underworld, the Jackal's house
the proud house that styles itself above the rest
the house of light and arrogance
the house of the hunt
the house of plenty, keepers of the food
the house of merchants and swift messengers
the lowest Color, miners and menials
Darrow and Eo are Reds of the mines
the ruling Color, lords and ladies of the Society
bred and trained for pleasure and companionship
artists and Carvers who reshape flesh
towering warrior Color, kept in awe of the Golds
soldiers and police of the Society
servants and drudges
administrators and bureaucrats who run the machine
financiers and merchants
pilots and navigators, born to the void of space
technologists and programmers
doctors and scholars
priests and judges who interpret the Color creed
engineers and mechanics who keep things running
the ruling Gold family of Mars: Nero, Mustang and the Jackal
a powerful Gold family and rivals of Augustus: Cassius, Julian, Karnus
the Gold family of Fitchner and Sevro
a loyal warrior family, home of Pax
Antonia's cold Gold family
the fabricated Gold lineage the Sons of Ares invent for Darrow
the mining township buried deep beneath Mars, Darrow's home
the red planet, secretly already habitable, worked by Reds who think they are pioneers
the surface city where Eo is hanged before the ArchGovernor
the gleaming capital of Mars, seat of the ArchGovernor
the brutal academy where young Golds are forged in a year-long war
the vast valley of castles and forests where the houses wage their game
House Mars's keep, the seat Darrow must hold
the floating mountain from which the Proctors watch and meddle
the helium-3 tunnels Darrow drills to terraform a world he'll never see
the monstrous drill a Helldiver rides into living rock
Darrow's curved signature blade, shaped like a Red's harvesting scythe
a Gold's whip-blade that snaps from rigid sword to lashing ribbon
a gauntlet weapon that fires concussive blasts
boots that let a Gold leap impossible heights and hover
a cloak that bends light to near-invisibility, the Howlers' favourite tool
each house's banner on its staff, the prize of the game
to take a house you seize its standard and bond its students
the forbidden song of the old freedoms Eo sings on the gallows
the rigid, Color-ruled empire spanning the planets and moons
the underground rebellion fighting to break the Color chains
the agonising surgery that remakes Darrow, Red to Gold
the Institute's first rite: paired students must kill or die
the Proctors pick students into houses like a slave auction
Gold overseers of the game, each masked as an Olympian god
the defeated are enslaved to the victor and branded with their mark
the student who leads a house
Golds who survive the Institute, marked forever with a scar
Sevro's pack of wolfcloaked raiders who strike in the dark
the dream of a free world for the Reds, Darrow's reason for everything

is what Eo dreams of breaking
